name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Characteristic_TimeFromEvent_Event
title: R5: The event used as a base point (reference point) in time (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.event[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.event[x]` 0..1 `CodeableConcept, dateTime, id, Reference`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.event[x]` 0..1 `CodeableConcept, dateTime, id, Reference`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.event[x]` is part of an existing definition because parent element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` requires an extension for additional cardinality.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.event[x]` has a context of EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromStart based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.event[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
